name: Natural Beauty Bio-Technology Limited
summary: Natural Beauty Bio-Technology Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells skin care, beauty, aroma-therapeutic, and health supplements and make-up products under the Natural Beauty brand in the People's Republic of China, Taiwan, and internationally. It also offers skin treatment, beauty and spa, medical cosmetology, and skin care consulting and beauty training services. The company's spas provide various services, including hydrotherapy, facial treatment, body care, and skin care analysis. In addition, it engages in the wholesale of skin care and beauty products. The company was founded in 1972 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
